title: Slime Aesthetic
description: Client-side pack that enhances visuals and quality-of-life while keeping the vanilla feel. Subtle tweaks, polished textures, interface improvements...
body:
**🎮 Concept**

**Slime Aesthetic** is a client-side pack focused entirely on visuals and quality-of-life polish. It enhances the look and feel of Minecraft without altering gameplay or mechanics.

Everything is purely aesthetic — refined textures, improved models, smoother animations, and a more cohesive interface — keeping the spirit of vanilla while making it more pleasant and consistent.

Because it’s fully client-side, it should work seamlessly on any server, including vanilla worlds and Realms, with no setup required.

**💡 Philosophy:**

Focus on **fixing visual inconsistencies**, **polishing neglected elements**, and providing **subtle improvements** that feel like they *should* have been part of the base game.
Perfect for players who love vanilla but wish it had a bit more polish and cohesion. 

**🧩 Key Features:**

- Fully client-side: no gameplay changes, no server requirements
- Improved models and textures
- Visual feedback enhancements (e.g., better animations, item glows)
- GUI improvements
- Fixes for forgotten/missing visuals in vanilla

**©️ Credits:**

- [Unique Goat Horns](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/unique-goat-horns/) Resource Pack
- Debug Stick texture from [Stormilla](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stormilla) Resource Pack
- Various [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/) Resource Packs
